system.description:
What it does (SRD): If the creature starts its turn with an opponent grappled in its mouth, it can swallow that opponent with another successful grapple check. Swallowed creatures can attack from inside, may be affected by acid or bludgeoning damage from the gizzard, and escape by cutting free or escaping the grapple.

ThirdEra: This item is prose-first: keep Mechanical effects and Capability grants empty unless you add a homebrew numeric row. Use the printed bite/gizzard damage, AC to cut out, and interior space from the stat block.
